siteDescription: Free online regression equation calculator. Compute linear, polynomial, and multiple regression equations instantly with step-by-step solutions.

home.title: Regression Equation Calculator
home.description: Compute regression equations instantly with our free online tool
home.intro: Enter your data points and get the regression equation, slope, intercept, R-squared value, and step-by-step calculations in seconds.
home.whatIsText: A regression equation models the relationship between variables, allowing you to predict outcomes based on input data. In its simplest form — simple linear regression — the equation is y = mx + b, where m is the slope and b is the y-intercept. This powerful statistical tool is used across science, business, and engineering to uncover trends, make forecasts, and quantify relationships between variables.
whyUsePoints: Instantly computes the regression equation from your data
Shows step-by-step calculations so you understand the math
Calculates R², correlation coefficient, slope, and intercept
No signup required — 100% free and runs in your browser
Your data stays private — nothing is sent to any server
useCasesPoints: Estimating house prices from square footage
Analyzing the impact of study hours on exam scores
Evaluating the relationship between dosage and response
home.howItWorksStep1: Enter your x and y data points in the table below
home.howItWorksStep2: Click Calculate to compute the regression equation
home.howItWorksStep3: View your results including equation, slope, intercept, and R² value
home.tableDescription: Common regression statistics and their interpretations

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn about the Regression Equation Calculator
about.content: The Regression Equation Calculator is a free online tool designed to help students, researchers, and professionals compute regression equations quickly and accurately. Our calculator supports linear regression and provides detailed step-by-step solutions to help you understand the mathematical process behind the results. Whether you're studying statistics, analyzing data, or working on research, our tool makes regression analysis accessible to everyone.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms and conditions for using the Regression Equation Calculator
terms.content: By accessing and using the Regression Equation Calculator website, you agree to be bound by these terms. Our tool is provided for educational and analytical purposes. Results should be verified for critical applications. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Use of the calculator is free and we do not guarantee the accuracy of results for professional or commercial purposes.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How we handle your data at the Regression Equation Calculator
privacy.content: We value your privacy. The Regression Equation Calculator does not collect, store, or share any personal data entered into the calculator. All calculations are performed locally in your browser. We may use analytics to understand site usage patterns, but no personally identifiable information is collected. Contact form submissions are processed securely and are not shared with third parties.
